description_long: This is a rectangular, upright beverage carton labeled 'FARAGELLO GOLD Premium Apple Nectar from Apple Concentrate.' The front features a large, realistic image of a red apple with a green leaf, set against a white background with gold and gray text. One side displays a vertical gold stripe with the word 'FARAGELLO' and 'PREMIUM APPLE NECTAR' in smaller text. The back contains detailed product information, including ingredients and a nutrition facts panel, as well as a small apple graphic at the bottom. The opposite side shows a barcode, recycling symbol, and additional product details. The carton appears to be made of laminated paperboard, typical for juice packaging, and is designed for single-use consumption.
description: A white and gold rectangular juice carton labeled 'FARAGELLO GOLD Premium Apple Nectar,' featuring a realistic apple image and detailed product information.
description_view_0: This view shows the side of the carton with a barcode, recycling symbol, and some product details in small text.
description_view_1: The front view displays the main branding, 'FARAGELLO GOLD,' a large red apple image, and the product volume.
description_view_2: This side features a bold vertical gold stripe with 'FARAGELLO' and 'PREMIUM APPLE NECTAR' text.
description_view_3: The back view contains detailed product information, a nutrition facts panel, and a small apple graphic at the bottom.
attribute_brand_logo: The brand logo 'FARAGELLO GOLD' is prominently displayed on the front and side in gold and gray text, with a stylized apple image on the front.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front shows a realistic red apple image and the text 'Premium Apple Nectar from Apple Concentrate,' clearly indicating apple flavor.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A nutrition facts panel is visible on the back, listing nutritional information and ingredients.
